Jeanette starts with 3 objects. Each week she adds 2 more.  
She practices for 5 weeks total. The pattern continues weekly.  
* * *  
Week one has 3 objects. Week two adds 2 more.  
Week three increases by 2 again. Week four continues the trend.  
* * *  
Week five is the final week. Total objects are calculated.  
Jeanette can juggle 13 objects by week five.
